meta.title: About | INTERESTING AMERICA
meta.description: Learn about INTERESTING AMERICA—your partner for sports accommodation since 2010.

data.headline: About Us
data.subheadline: Talk is cheap. We are INTERESTING.

data.headline: Our Story
data.text:
Since 2010, INTERESTING SPORTS has been the go-to accommodation partner for the world's biggest sports events. With INTERESTING AMERICA, we bring that expertise to the US market.

We are the official ISTAA partner alongside ALHI, Hilton and others. Our 2024 Annual Meeting was hosted at FC Barcelona. Now we're focused on Winter Olympics 2026 Milano/Cortina, FIFA World Cup 2026, and LA Olympics 2028.
